name: Wifi → Configure
description: This action connects to an SSID and password, optionally saving it in persistent memory so that the next time the WiFi interface is enabled, it will connect to the stored access point.

config_entries.label: SSID
config_entries.description: The name of the WiFi access point.

config_entries.label: Password
config_entries.description: The password of the WiFi access point. Leave empty for no password.

config_entries.label: Save
config_entries.description: If set to `true`, the SSID and password will be saved in persistent memory. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: Timeout
config_entries.description: The time to wait for the connection to be established. Defaults to 30 seconds.
